{{ i18n().settings.title }}

@if (!editingConfig()) {
@for (config of configs(); track config.id) {
{{ config.name }} {{ config.provider }}
} @empty {

No profiles found.

}
} @else {
@if (configPortal()) { }

{{ i18n().settings.rateLimitTitle }}

@if (modelPricing()) {

{{ i18n().settings.modelPricingTitle }}

{{ i18n().settings.modelInput }} ({{ modelPricing()!.estInput / 1000 }}K) ${{ modelPricing()!.inputCost.toFixed(4) }}
{{ i18n().settings.modelCached }} ({{ modelPricing()!.estCached / 1000 }}K) ${{ modelPricing()!.cacheCost.toFixed(4) }}
{{ i18n().settings.modelOutput }} ({{ modelPricing()!.estOutput / 1000 }}K) ${{ modelPricing()!.outputCost.toFixed(4) }}
Total Projection: ${{ modelPricing()!.total.toFixed(4) }}
{{ i18n().settings.modelEstDisclaimer }}
}
{{ testStatus() }}
@if (testResponse()) {
{{ i18n().settings.modelResponse }}
{{ testResponse() }}
}
}
